psymetrics 0.3.0

    • Reporting and visualization
  • Changelog

Package index

Fit Indices

model_fit()
Generic Function to Extract Model Fit Indices
model_fit(<lavaan>)
Extract Fit Indices from a lavaan Model
compare_model_fit()
Compare Model Fit Indices Across Multiple Models

Model Estimates

model_estimates()
Generic Function to Extract Model Parameter Estimates
model_estimates(<lavaan>)
Extract Parameter Estimates from a lavaan Model

Reporting And Tables

format_results()
Format model results for output
save_table()
Save a Table to a Specified Format

Visualization

plot_factor_loadings()
Plot Factor Loadings for lavaan Models
plot(<lavaan>)
Plot Method for lavaan Objects
plot-methods
Generic Plot Function for Model Visualizations

S3 Print Methods

print(<model_fit>)
Print Method for Model Fit Indices
print(<compare_model_fit>)
Print Method for compare_model_fit Objects
print(<model_estimates>)
Print Method for model_estimates Objects

On this page
